h5ce31ed8ge0adg445bga931g3c13dae59bb5: I suppose we'll start in the Outer City, get a little business going...
h92d50014gc472g411dgbbdfg1f8180aa5f0e: Your spiced tea is life-changing. And I can bake up almond cakes twenty at a time!
h07ca064cg751dg41f1ga98agc3766c78192a: And we'll have a dog, right?
hb452b872ge96ag4d4cgbdc8g014c756f0bf9: They don't allow 'em in Baldur's Gate. Cats, though...
hf8e5a5b6g3671g4e20g89ebg888f629b5e47: A little orange cat! And a house with a little door so it can come and go as it pleases.
h4c4715deg351cg4667gad8cg0729a555fa99: What'll we name it? I like 'Geoffrey.'
h49f62299gb2bdg4e74gb539g0ee51bbc268f: Idle chatter. Have you nothing better to do?
h9369fa78ga3bdg445ag9b2bg8775c3af7895: No harm in fantasizing about the future. Or don't they do that wherever you're from?
h51b0a68dg37ebg4608gbf66g6d1e24714905: I have but one plan: to earn the favour of my beloved Queen Vlaakith.
h2cd2d041gb693g410fga023g5faa2ef6cbff: I'm... sure you'll do just that. Right, Danis?
h7227c28fg1f46g4803g8a2cge88aecccbd19: Sure. Yes. Queen Vlaakith and everything.
he1fe1b31gaad4g4886g979ag8b21db176363: I aim to purge the parasite infecting my brain.
hfef6c51egc5d9g4899g96bfg26ad728c8910: Rest a bit. We're leaving soon. You'll like Baldur's Gate. It's for all sorts.
h793e1ad4gc326g4b6cg90e9g7b32e724ba9e: What is this 'cat' you speak of?
h77914548g1315g45d5g84b6g46093d243c72: Right. Erm. Danis, we've got to do the thing... in the place... over there. Remember?
hcd34e683g8fdag4a5fgbe09g7dcd31c66984: What use do you have of this creature?
hf5fc8e94g2ad3g4f92g823ag1ca16568aa40: Well, they're excellent mousers. And their little faces are so cute!
h2d65f545gef10g487cg8b01g4c10333a5e68: Where are you from where there are no cats, by the by?
h1dd83785gb6cbg46dag97e2g4dd9c9900df6: I hail from another plane. Is that not obvious?
h38b0cc86g8c2ag4368ga4adgdfe73499ac00: Hm. Right. Well, welcome to the Sword Coast.
h06cb97c3g8e85g40b7gb224g850d03f7936d: Come with us to Baldur's Gate. If cats are new to you, you won't believe what you'll find there.
hffe926f7ga193g4505gb747g1f18b0cdaf34: I am from a land far from here.
h18142942g13c6g4688g93b5g524fff43034a: I figured. But no matter. We're going to make ourselves a new home in Baldur's Gate. You can too.
h342e3dfag426fg4570gac39gf55fba3c326c: Travel with us, if you like. Maybe we can show you to squirrels and ducks on the way.
he1be11c5gcb6fg4570ga75dgdfbac87ebcfa: Where were we, love? A cat and a house with a porch...
he22eccfbgcea0g4da5g843ag24af10902791: Look - whoever you are, whatever you're into, you'll find it in Baldur's Gate. I only have eyes for this one here.
h74edb7bbgdf8dg468cg9a9cgdcc5c725afc6: Ah, yes - I know the beasts. Insufficiently meaty.
h93e508b8g57a7g4f76g8775gbc509f33fe1c: Oh really? What do you suggest then?
hf2872540gd5cdg4063gba8egd1859a9cb203: It is a beast of burden. It requires no name.
h54b37c01g06c0g468eg8f35g6bb12422b185: Beast of burden? It's a kitty-cat, not a rothé.
hf23c9c64g628eg412cg86d4g29fbca82e924: 'Geoffrey' is great. Let's go with that.
h0dde7f67g240ag4c17g9f5cg1ed8702c59a8: A powerful githyanki name should suffice: 'Krak'jthak'.
h7799875fg6f3bg4037gbe70g457955f6a57e: 'Crack-what'? Gone gods, It's just a kitty-cat.
h636bf785gd098g4e1bg828ag427766ab3c23: I couldn't say. Only varsh name githyanki young.
h7168fa15g4102g4d96gace6g9c174b3a8b5f: Let's start with one and see how it goes.
h7025ff9egd9ebg4dadg8e49g07cfbf1f83e5: ... and a high fence to keep eavesdroppers out.
h10471e6dgc3abg41e6gad72gc24ca5db85db: Don't mind me. I was just passing through.
hff97e2cag37b3g4afdg8bf9g53a75c9dc785: No bother. We're just daydreaming, anyhow.
h944360cfg2e72g414dg9c3egab5ab0e10b21: What about you? Big plans for when you get to the city?
h10087506g8246g4d34ga4f9g8383a6ed4725: A pint and a clean room would do me a world of good.
h7ace3ff8g42e9g4f51ga429gf396be1ba807: Won't be long now. One more trip, then we can really rest.
h4e1a8026g1499g40c2ga07ag96398b98da80: Plans? Just surviving the journey is ambitious enough already.
h44c3bef0gd552g4f19gad02ge0800caf08cb: Luck's been on our side this far. No reason to think it'll run out now.
h21c7b417g2a36g41dfg98f5g06e5e22d4dc4: Oh. That's too bad. I'd heard you were good in a fight.
hd58ea25dg8e3cg40bag8173g86a4968d79b8: I'll be keeping to myself. People tend to stare at me.
h9f447dbfgfbffg48c5g8eecgec806638e731: But... I've heard there's all sorts in the city. It might not be like it was in Elturel. I mean - in Baldur's Gate, they give you a chance.
h33c8c41aga984g4bd7gb07bg3df1d6f1adfc: Good luck to you. Wish us a little too. I think we'll all need it.
h11674483g5974g45e5ga08bg8e74206d7c43: Well - I could always stop by your place for a bite.
h6b8de7f2gc3abg4e28g9b78gebce4047a1a2: I'd start with a pint and take it from there.
h706fb3e1g2774g4243g8355g01e68df2a681: I'll be tracking down an old friend.
h8690b34bgf56ag43b7g9f5dg261e8011da24: A pint of ale and a warm companion are my first priorities.
he4bbaf2dg89a7g4b36gbee7gef016c3598bf: I've never been to Baldur's Gate before. Perhaps I can drop in on you.
hf25cd257ga7c7g44c1gbab7gf5c3ca5e14fa: Of course! You're definitely invited. We'll make dinner.
h84814af8g6dc1g424bgb5e2g8b9da2edd193: A halfling after our own hearts.
he5f8c41dg1333g410fgb4ccg383e8d4ae9dd: I hope it's a happy reunion!
hddf4d0f8g6397g4372g8f7cge17bf28aab73: Hah! You two will be busy, if half of what I hear is true.
hcd6d29a8gfa7eg4c77gba81ga43fb48e792c: You're lucky. We've no friends to turn to there. Just each other.
h0a80312cgb5afg4551g98c7g7d6417481057: May your ale be dark, and the loving sweet!
h80d8601bgd221g4a61g94d3gd65693a37e48: Good luck to you, then. And wish us some too!
hcee48520g678cg47d4g9767g6d72ffb834d0: It's the Blushing Mermaid for me. Bit rough, but the ale's cheap.
hfef488ffg976dg41d2g9cdcg81a83a4b5a1c: We've had enough rough to last us a good long while.
h952a9c1cga20bg4a87g9b92g1ee24f522459: I'll be seeking the warmth of the Elfsong Tavern.
h9ae2f524gc9dcg44a4gaca1g964752e2e6a1: I think I've heard of that place. Something about a stuffed dragon's head in one of the dining rooms...
h6be02656gf441g4d06g8684g5e8117afcc36: It's settled, Danis. You, me, and the Elfsong Tavern, first thing when we arrive.
h6789df66g6be6g4442gb7d5gca2b5233aea6: If we see you there, we'll get you a pint. For your finder's fee.
hf90853a6gfb67g40d9g8be2gd81309a47239: Sorry, didn't mean to interrupt. Good luck to you both.
h4a3ba42fg8fb3g4098g899eg51e5928c63e0: Thanks. I suppose we'll all need it.
hfe86504dg6befg4e0egb21bgcb47b6f00234: Two tiefling refugees? You'll be lucky to get a square of dirt at a public house.
h9c785138g7ef3g4b09ga7d1gb088bfe39146: If that's what we're offered, we'll take it. Everyone's got to start somewhere.
